rationale: Section 11.29 governs exemptions for Intracoastal Waterway dredge disposal sites. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of land that the person owns and that has been dedicated by recorded donated easement dedicating said land as a disposal site for depositing and discharging materials dredged from the main channel of the Gulf Intracoastal Waterway
_note: No relationship between §11.29 and the proposed §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase.
